title: Monocoque Agent Engram MCP Tools — Unified Code Knowledge Graph
description: New MCP tool definitions for code graph indexing, traversal, cross-region linking, and unified search

index_workspace.description: Parse all supported source files in the workspace and populate the code knowledge graph with file, function, class, and interface nodes plus structural edges (calls, imports, inherits_from, defines). Generates embeddings using the tiered strategy (direct for small nodes, summary-pointer for large). Reports progress via SSE events.

force.description: If true, re-index all files regardless of existing state. If false (default), skips files with matching content_hash.

files_skipped.description: Number of files skipped (unsupported language, too large, excluded)

edges_created.description: Total edges created (calls + imports + inherits_from + defines)

sync_workspace.description: Detect changed, added, and deleted files since the last index and incrementally update the code graph. Uses two-level hashing: file-level content_hash to find changed files, symbol-level body_hash to re-embed only changed symbols. Preserves concerns edges via hash-resilient identity matching.

files_deleted.description: Number of deleted files removed from graph

files_unchanged.description: Number of files with matching content_hash (skipped)

symbols_re_embedded.description: Number of symbols whose body_hash changed and required re-embedding

symbols_reused.description: Number of symbols with matching body_hash (embedding reused)

concerns_relinked.description: Number of concerns edges re-linked to moved symbols

concerns_orphaned.description: Number of concerns edges removed (symbol no longer exists)

no_changes.description: True if no files changed since last index

map_code.description: Retrieve a code symbol's definition plus its graph neighborhood to the specified traversal depth. Returns full source bodies for all nodes. Falls back to vector search when the exact symbol name is not found.

symbol_name.description: Name of the function, class, or interface to look up

depth.description: Graph traversal depth (1 = direct neighbors only). Silently clamped to config max_traversal_depth if exceeded.

max_nodes.description: Maximum nodes to return before truncation. Silently clamped to config max_traversal_nodes if exceeded.

root.description: The requested symbol with full source body

neighbors.description: Neighboring nodes within traversal depth, each with full source body

truncated.description: True if results were truncated at max_nodes

fallback_used.description: True if vector search was used (exact name not found)

matches.description: When symbol_name matches multiple nodes, all matches grouped by file

effective_depth.description: Actual depth used after config clamping

effective_max_nodes.description: Actual max_nodes used after config clamping

_response_modes.description: map_code returns one of three response shapes depending on match results
_response_modes.single_match: root is populated with the matched node, neighbors contains BFS neighborhood, edges contains connecting edges, matches is null
_response_modes.multiple_matches: root is null, matches contains all matching nodes grouped by file, neighbors and edges cover the first match's neighborhood
_response_modes.fallback_vector_search: root is null, fallback_used is true, matches contains top vector-similarity results, neighbors is empty
_response_modes.no_results: root is null, fallback_used is true, matches is empty array, neighbors is empty array

link_task_to_code.description: Create concerns edges between a task and all code nodes matching the given symbol name.

symbol_name.description: Name of the code symbol to link to

unlink_task_from_code.description: Remove concerns edges between a task and all code nodes matching the given symbol name.

symbol_name.description: Name of the code symbol to unlink from

get_active_context.description: Return all in-progress tasks with their linked code context. For the highest-priority task, includes full source bodies and 1-hop dependency neighborhoods of all concerns-linked code nodes. For remaining tasks, includes task metadata and linked symbol names only.

relevant_code.description: Full code neighborhoods for linked symbols

primary_task.description: Highest-priority in-progress task with expanded code context. Null when no tasks are in_progress. Tiebreaker: created_at (oldest first).

other_tasks.description: Remaining in-progress tasks with linked symbol names

unified_search.description: Perform hybrid vector+keyword search across both code and task regions, returning merged ranked results.

region.description: Scope the search to a specific region

node_type.description: function, class, interface, code_file, task, context, spec

linked_symbols.description: For task nodes: linked code symbol names

impact_analysis.description: Traverse code dependencies and cross-region concerns edges to find all tasks affected by changes to a specific code symbol.

symbol_name.description: Name of the code symbol to analyze

dependency_path.description: Chain of symbol names from the target to the linked symbol

affected_tasks.description: Tasks linked to any code node in the neighborhood

no_task_links.description: True if no tasks reference this symbol or its neighbors

effective_depth.description: Actual depth used after config clamping

effective_max_nodes.description: Actual max_nodes used after config clamping

list_symbols.description: Return a paginated list of indexed code symbols (functions, classes, interfaces). Enables agents to discover valid symbol names before invoking map_code, link_task_to_code, or impact_analysis.

name_prefix.description: Filter symbols whose name starts with this prefix

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

total_count.description: Total number of matching symbols (for pagination)

has_more.description: True if more results exist beyond limit+offset

flush_state.description: Extended to also serialize code graph metadata to .engram/code-graph/nodes.jsonl and .engram/code-graph/edges.jsonl. Returns error 7003 if indexing is in progress.
changes: Writes .engram/code-graph/nodes.jsonl (code node metadata, embeddings, hashes — no source bodies)
Returns error 7003 (IndexInProgress) if index_workspace or sync_workspace is running

set_workspace.description: Extended to hydrate code graph from .engram/code-graph/ metadata + source file parsing
changes: Parses source files for code node bodies
Compares body_hash for diff-rehydration (reuses persisted embeddings for unchanged symbols)

get_workspace_status.description: Extended to include code graph statistics
changes: Response includes code_graph object with file_count, function_count, class_count, interface_count, edge_count, concerns_count, last_indexed_at

body.description: Full source body (included per FR-148 for map_code, get_active_context, impact_analysis; NOT included for unified_search results)
